articles.title: STATE OF TRUST IN AI: HOW TO PROVE TRUST IN AI
articles.summary: In an era where AI is rapidly transforming industries, building trust with potential buyers and sellers has become paramount. How can AI companies demonstrate trust and ensure their security practices are robust, secure, and aligned with the highest standards?

articles.title: AI ENHANCES SIMULATIONS WITH SMARTER SAMPLING
articles.summary: MIT CSAIL researchers have developed an AI-powered method for low-discrepancy sampling that improves the accuracy of simulations by distributing data points more uniformly.

articles.title: ANNOUNCING FLUX1.1 [PRO] AND THE BFL API
articles.summary: FLUX1.1 [pro] has been released. It offers six times faster generation than its predecessor with improved image quality and performance. The new beta BFL API, which features advanced customization and competitive pricing, allows developers to integrate FLUX's capabilities. FLUX1.1 [pro] will be available on several platforms, enhancing scalability and efficiency.

articles.title: OPENAI LAUNCHES NEW 'CANVAS' CHATGPT INTERFACE TAILORED TO WRITING AND CODING PROJECTS
articles.summary: OpenAI has launched "canvas," a new ChatGPT interface for writing and coding projects in a separate workspace. This move aligns with industry trends towards editable workspaces, competing with Anthropic's Artifacts and Cursor. canvas is initially available only to select users.

articles.title: DISTRIBUTED TRAINING OF DEEP LEARNING MODELS
articles.summary: A great introduction to the challenges and some of the algorithms behind distributed training of many modern deep learning models, this post discusses the challenges and bottlenecks of training models that are too large for a single GPU.

articles.title: COMFYGEN TEXT-TO-IMAGE
articles.summary: Instead of generating an image directly from a prompt, these authors generated a comfy UI node based workflow to generate an image. They found that this substantially improved the final output quality.

articles.title: SKETCH-BASED IMAGE GENERATION
articles.summary: KnobGen is a new framework designed to make sketch-based image generation more accessible for users with different skill levels.

articles.title: 429 ENGINEERS & TECHNICAL LEADERS ALREADY HAVE THEIR PASS. 🎟️
articles.summary: Generative AI Summit Boston returns, October 17 & 18:

articles.title: TINY IMAGE MODEL
articles.summary: AI researcher Ross Wightman has released a set of models trained on Imagenet-1k that are extremely small (sub 1 million parameters) but still perform somewhat well and are easy to tune.

articles.title: ENTROPY BASED SAMPLING
articles.summary: Entropy based sampling and parallel Chain of Thought decoding are potential paths forward to match performance of reasoning models like o1.

articles.title: A LIBRARY FOR GENERATIVE SOCIAL SIMULATION
articles.summary: Deepmind's Concordia repository can be used to simulate social interactions between individuals and groups at reasonable scale.

articles.title: OPENAI'S ORIGINAL SIN
articles.summary: Recent departures of senior executives at OpenAI highlight ongoing internal conflicts between prioritizing product development and revenue versus research and safety. These issues stem from the company's foundational promise to develop AGI for the benefit of all humanity, which has proven challenging amidst financial and strategic pressures. OpenAI is negotiating a $6.5 billion funding round with conditions that could transform it into a for-profit entity.

articles.title: THE ART OF THE OPENAI DEAL
articles.summary: OpenAI's revenue surged to $300M in August. The company is projecting $3.7B in annual sales for this year and $11.6B for next year, but it faces a $5B annual loss. Its rapid growth was fueled by the popularity of ChatGPT, which accounts for most of its revenue. Despite the growth, OpenAI is seeking more investors due to high operational costs and to evolve into a profitable entity.

articles.title: WHAT COMES AFTER?
articles.summary: Californian Governor Gavin Newsom has vetoed the state's SB 1047 bill, which aimed to regulate large AI models. He emphasized the need for evidence-based regulations and warned against overly stringent rules that could stifle innovation. Newsom plans to develop empirical, science-based guidelines with experts like Dr. Fei-Fei Li.

articles.title: GET ACCESS TO THE LATEST NVIDIA H100 TENSOR CORE GPUS — AI-READY COMPUTE, POWERED BY CLEAN ENERGY
articles.summary: The ninth-generation NVIDIA H100 Cloud GPUs deliver an order-of-magnitude performance leap for GenAI and HPC workloads. Now available in Europe via Taiga Cloud. NVIDIA H200 GPUs also available

articles.title: ANTHROPIC HIRES OPENAI CO-FOUNDER DURK KINGMA
articles.summary: Durk Kingma, a co-founder of OpenAI, has joined Anthropic and will work remotely from the Netherlands.

articles.title: OPENAI UNVEILS EASY VOICE ASSISTANT CREATION AT 2024 DEVELOPER EVENT
articles.summary: OpenAI announced major API updates at DevDay, including the Realtime API for speech-to-speech conversations and improvements to the Chat Completions API.

articles.title: SORRY, GENAI IS NOT GOING TO 10X COMPUTER PROGRAMMING
articles.summary: Recent studies show that generative AI is not achieving the promised 10x improvement in coding productivity.
